channel.title: Uncategorized on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Uncategorized on Have an average day :|

item.title: It's (a)live!
item.description: So The Hijax is live. I finally have a good looking & functional site. I’ve been working on getting this site up for months. I was way to ambitious when I set out to create this. I had not created a site since 1999 and 13 years later I just decided to make one. To paraphrase; One simply does not create a website. I quickly found out that I knew a lot about setting up the server but nothing about the site.
